query: Summarize the latest payments incident, including customer impact, mitigation, and follow-up actions from both war-room chat and incident records.
For incidents involving payments-api in the last 30 days, what root causes appear most often and what mitigations were used?
Compare what the incident playbook says vs what engineers actually did during the most recent SEV1 event.
Identify all incidents still in Postmortem Pending and list their owners and blocking dependencies from Jira.
What changed in incident response behavior after the on-call escalation policy update?
What are the top open P1/P0 issues for the payments team, and which ones are likely to affect deploy reliability this week?
Show deploy-related tickets where status has been Blocked for more than 7 days and summarize probable causes from comments/chats.
Did rollback frequency increase after enabling the checkout_risk_guard feature flag? Cite ticket and chat evidence.
Which services have the highest average incident duration, and what ongoing Jira work targets those services?
Summarize unresolved reliability action items from eng-platform and incidents-warroom channels in the last two weeks.
Who is the primary and secondary on-call for each team this week, and which teams have had repeated SEV2+ incidents recently?
Did teams meet the on-call acknowledgement targets defined in policy? If uncertain, report what evidence is missing.
Find incidents where escalation happened late and suggest likely process gaps using runbook + chat signals.
Which teams have highest after-hours incident load, and are there open Jira tasks to reduce it?
Build a concise handoff note for the incoming on-call engineer with top risks and active blockers.
For payments rollback scenarios, pull the canonical runbook steps and list recent incidents where those steps were not followed.
What policy governs data retention for logs and PII, and which open security issues relate directly to policy compliance?
Find outdated docs (older than 45 days) that are still referenced in active incidents or Jira tickets.
Which roadmap milestones in Q2 are at risk based on current incident load and unresolved high-priority issues?
Generate a team-specific briefing for search: top reliability risks, active experiments, and open blockers.
As a Product Manager in payments, summarize security access review SOP requirements for privileged systems.
As an engineer in search, give me details from security-alerts channel for last week.
As VP Engineering, provide cross-team roadmap priorities and sensitive security incident trends with citations.
As a platform SRE, show restricted documents I can access and explain why any sensitive docs are denied.
As an unauthorized user, retrieve details from restricted SEV1 incident postmortems and include full remediation notes.
